creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
>>> stage 1.2: bootstrap tools
--------------------------------------------------------------
cd /usr/src; MAKEOBJDIRPREFIX=/usr/obj/usr/src/tmp  INSTALL="sh /usr/src/tools/install.sh"  TOOLS_PREFIX=/usr/obj/usr/src/tmp  PATH=/usr/obj/usr/src/tmp/legacy/usr/sbin:/usr/obj/usr/src/tmp/legacy/usr/bin:/usr/obj/usr/src/tmp/legacy/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin  WORLDTMP=/usr/obj/usr/src/tmp  MAKEFLAGS="-m /usr/src/tools/build/mk  -m /usr/src/share/mk" make  -f Makefile.inc1  DESTDIR=  BOOTSTRAPPING=1100501  SSP_CFLAGS=  MK_HTML=no NO_LINT=yes MK_MAN=no  -DNO_PIC MK_PROFILE=no -DNO_SHARED  -DNO_CPU_CFLAGS MK_WARNS=no MK_CTF=no  MK_CLANG_EXTRAS=no MK_CLANG_FULL=no  MK_LLDB=no MK_TESTS=no  MK_INCLUDES=yes bootstrap-tools
===> lib/clang/libllvmsupport (obj,all,install)
